entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop studied, Pennisetum americanum

entities.description: The country from which the germplasm was assembled

entities.name: PATANEHERU
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT Center

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The collection of cultivated, intermediate, and wild accessions of pearl millet

entities.name: SOUNA
entities.description: An early-maturing cultivar type of pearl millet

entities.name: SANIO
entities.description: A late-maturing cultivar type of pearl millet

entities.name: THIOTANDE
entities.description: A cultivar type of pearl millet producing large grains with starchy endosperm

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of maturing early in the growth cycle

entities.name: LATE MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of maturing late in the growth cycle

entities.name: LOW RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by 350-600 mm of rainfall

entities.name: HIGH RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by 900-1200 mm of rainfall

entities.name: NORTH SENEGAL
entities.description: The northern region of Senegal

entities.name: SOUTH SENEGAL
entities.description: The southern region of Senegal

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the crop grains

entities.name: STARCHY ENDOSPERM
entities.description: The presence of starchy endosperm in the grain

entities.name: LONG DAYS
entities.description: Photoperiod condition of long daylight hours

entities.name: SHORT DAYS
entities.description: Photoperiod condition of short daylight hours

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The study of cyclic and seasonal natural phenomena in the crop

entities.name: ARISTATION
entities.description: The presence or absence of bristles on the spike

entities.name: SPIKE SHAPE
entities.description: The morphological shape of the crop spike

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of grouping accessions into cultivar groups

entities.name: IDENTIFICATION KEY
entities.description: A tool developed to identify the cultivar groups

entities.name: LONG SPIKES
entities.description: The trait of having elongated spikes

entities.name: GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: The density of grains within the spike

entities.name: LONG BRISTLES
entities.description: The trait of having long bristles
